label: 房间门洞
description: 在每个房间与走廊接壤的墙壁上开门洞，保证所有房间的连通性
description-en: Opens door gaps on walls between rooms and corridors, ensuring all rooms are connected.
icon: 矩形房间边界上有一个缺口与外侧走廊相连，深色墙体配亮色门洞开口，扁平插画风格简洁小图标主色2种

inputs.name: maxDoorsPerRoom
inputs.label: 每房间最多门数
inputs.description: 每个房间最多开几个门（超出部分由概率决定是否开）
inputs.description-en: Maximum number of doors per room (extras are probability-gated).

inputs.name: doorProbability
inputs.label: 开门概率
inputs.description: 第一扇门必开；此概率控制额外门的开启概率（0=只开一门，1=开满maxDoorsPerRoom）
inputs.description-en: First door is always opened; this probability controls extra doors (0=one door only, 1=open all up to max).

inputs.name: doorValue
inputs.label: 门洞标记值
inputs.description: 门洞格子填写的值，必须不同于走廊(1)，默认2
inputs.description-en: Cell value written into door openings; must differ from corridor (1). Default 2.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0使用当前时间戳

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 输出网格
outputs.description: 开门后的网格；走廊=1，门洞=doorValue(默认2)，墙=0，房间>=10
outputs.description-en: Grid with door openings; corridor=1, door=doorValue(default 2), wall=0, rooms>=10.
